meta.title: Deeptech Attractiveness Index
meta.description: A composite index benchmarking 26 countries (15 European, 11 African) as destinations for deeptech R&D.
meta.methodology: OECD/JRC Handbook on Constructing Composite Indicators (2008). 6 equal-weighted pillars; arithmetic mean of z-standardized indicators.
meta.gdpNote: GDP is NOT present in the source workbooks; gdpUsd is null pending a verified source (e.g. World Bank, single year).

pillars.name: Human Capital
pillars.fullName: Scientific Knowledge and Advanced Human Capital
